start.speaker: Your Family
start.text: Why do you speak as if the whole city were already burning? Come inside. Sit by the table. Surely this dread will pass by morning.
start.text_zh: 你为何说得好像整座城已经在烧？进屋来。在桌边坐下。这惊惧想必到天亮就过去了。

choices.text: I cannot quiet what the book has awakened. The city will not stand.
choices.text_zh: 那本书所唤醒的，我无法平息。这城存留不住。

choices.text: Then come with me — all of you. I would not walk toward life alone.
choices.text_zh: 那就和我一起走吧——你们都来。我不愿独自走向生命。

choices.text: Say nothing for a moment, and look toward the distant light.
choices.text_zh: 片刻不语，望向远处的光。

children.speaker: Your Family
children.text: And the little ones asleep upstairs — who tells them their father chased a light in a book and left them to the dark? Is that love, or madness?
children.text_zh: 还有楼上熟睡的孩子——谁去告诉他们，父亲为了书里的一道光，撇下他们留在黑暗里？这是爱，还是疯了？

choices.text: I go partly for them — that mercy might reach this house through an open door, not a closed one.
choices.text_zh: 我去，也是为了他们——好叫怜悯能借着一道敞开的门、而非紧闭的门，临到这一家。

choices.text: Maybe... maybe I am being cruel. The thought of their faces nearly turns me back.
choices.text_zh: 也许……也许我太狠心了。一想到他们的脸，我几乎要回头。

invite.speaker: Your Family
invite.text: You ask me to fear a fire I cannot feel, and to leave all we have built on the strength of your dream. I cannot — not yet. But go, and... I will watch the road you take.
invite.text_zh: 你要我去惧怕一团我感觉不到的火，凭你一个梦撇下我们建立的一切。我不能——还不能。但你去吧，我……我会望着你所走的那条路。

choices.text: Then watch it well. If the dread proves true, follow the same road. I will pray you do.
choices.text_zh: 那就好好望着。若这惊惧应验了，就走同一条路。我必为你祷告，愿你跟上来。

plead.speaker: Your Family
plead.text: Then go, if you must. But know this: love makes your leaving hurt more, not less.
plead.text_zh: 那就去吧，你若非去不可。但要知道：爱，只会让你的离去更痛，而非更轻。

choices.text: I will not forget you. I go because mercy still calls; pray that you hear it too.
choices.text_zh: 我不会忘记你。我去，是因怜悯仍在呼唤；愿你也听见它。
